channel.title: How to update gatsby-source-wordpress-experimental
channel.description:
Hi there I am getting this error when I try to deploy on netlify:
``` error gatsby-source-wordpress Your remote version of WPGatsby is not within the accepted range
9:57:58 PM: (>=0.9.0 <2.0.0)
9:57:58 PM: This is not a bug and it means one of two things:
9:57:58 PM: you either need to upgrade WPGatsby or gatsby-source-wordpress-experimental.
9:57:58 PM: 1. If the version of WPGatsby in your WordPress instance is higher than 2.0.0
9:57:58 PM: it means you need to upgrade your version of gatsby-source-wordpress-experimental. ``` I got my frontity app built by a developer, and now is giving me this error and I have no clue on how to fix it.
Any help will be highly appreciate.
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->

item.title: How to update gatsby-source-wordpress-experimental
item.dc:creator: santoshdevnath15
item.description:
hi @alin1, I think if you will host your Frontity APP on Vercel then it will work properly. And Frontity also recommends Vercel.

Read full topic

item.title: How to update gatsby-source-wordpress-experimental
item.dc:creator: alin1
item.description:
Hi there I am getting this error when I try to deploy on netlify:

error gatsby-source-wordpress Your remote version of WPGatsby is not within the accepted range

9:57:58 PM: (>=0.9.0 <2.0.0)

9:57:58 PM: This is not a bug and it means one of two things:

9:57:58 PM: you either need to upgrade WPGatsby or gatsby-source-wordpress-experimental.

9:57:58 PM: 1. If the version of WPGatsby in your WordPress instance is higher than 2.0.0

9:57:58 PM: it means you need to upgrade your version of gatsby-source-wordpress-experimental.

I got my frontity app built by a developer, and now is giving me this error and I have no clue on how to fix it.

Any help will be highly appreciate.

Read full topic
